'''âng-y-y''' ('''kangayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:custom|custom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:custom|custom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kangayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingayay|thingayay]] || [[word:jingayay|jingayay]] || [[word:shingayay|shingayay]] || [[word:kingayay|kingayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungayay|thuthungayay]] || [[word:jujungayay|jujungayay]] || [[word:shushungayay|shushungayay]] || [[word:kukungayay|kukungayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungayay|thungayay]] || [[word:jungayay|jungayay]] || [[word:shungayay|shungayay]] || [[word:kungayay|kungayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungayay|thungayay]] || [[word:jungayay|jungayay]] || [[word:shungayay|shungayay]] || [[word:kungayay|kungayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengayay|thengayay]] || [[word:jengayay|jengayay]] || [[word:shengayay|shengayay]] || [[word:kengayay|kengayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongayay|thothongayay]] || [[word:jojongayay|jojongayay]] || [[word:shoshongayay|shoshongayay]] || [[word:kokongayay|kokongayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongayay|thongayay]] || [[word:jongayay|jongayay]] || [[word:shongayay|shongayay]] || [[word:kongayay|kongayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongayay|thongayay]] || [[word:jongayay|jongayay]] || [[word:shongayay|shongayay]] || [[word:kongayay|kongayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngayay|thĂŠngayay]] || [[word:jĂŠngayay|jĂŠngayay]] || [[word:shĂŠngayay|shĂŠngayay]] || [[word:kĂŠngayay|kĂŠngayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangayay|thathangayay]] || [[word:jajangayay|jajangayay]] || [[word:shashangayay|shashangayay]] || [[word:kakangayay|kakangayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangayay|thangayay]] || [[word:jangayay|jangayay]] || [[word:shangayay|shangayay]] || [[word:kangayay|kangayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangayay|thangayay]] || [[word:jangayay|jangayay]] || [[word:shangayay|shangayay]] || [[word:kangayay|kangayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangayay|shangayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangayay|goshangayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangayay|gokishangayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangayaynĂŒ|shangayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangayaynknĂŒ|goshangayaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayaynĂŒ|gokishangayaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangayayshĂ«|shangayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangayaynkshĂ«|goshangayaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangayayshĂ«|gokishangayayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayayro|shangayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayaynkro|goshangayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayayro|gokishangayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayaymu|shangayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayaynkmu|goshangayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayaymu|gokishangayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangayaysher|shangayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangayaynksher|goshangayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangayaysher|gokishangayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangayayng|shangayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangayaynkng|goshangayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangayayng|gokishangayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangayaya|shangayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangayaynkya|goshangayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangayaya|gokishangayaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangayayam|shangayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangayaynkyam|goshangayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangayayam|gokishangayayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayaynĂŒshĂ«|shangayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshangayaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishangayaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayaynĂŒro|shangayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayaynknĂŒro|goshangayaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayaynĂŒro|gokishangayaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayaynĂŒmu|shangayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayaynknĂŒmu|goshangayaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayaynĂŒmu|gokishangayaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayayshĂ«nĂŒ|shangayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangayaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangayayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayayshĂ«ro|shangayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayaynkshĂ«ro|goshangayaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayayshĂ«ro|gokishangayayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayayshĂ«mu|shangayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayaynkshĂ«mu|goshangayaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayayshĂ«mu|gokishangayayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayayronĂŒ|shangayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayaynkronĂŒ|goshangayaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayayronĂŒ|gokishangayayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayayroshĂ«|shangayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayaynkroshĂ«|goshangayaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayayroshĂ«|gokishangayayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangayayromu|shangayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangayaynkromu|goshangayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangayayromu|gokishangayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangayaymunĂŒ|shangayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangayaynkmunĂŒ|goshangayaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangayaymunĂŒ|gokishangayaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangayaymushĂ«|shangayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangayaynkmushĂ«|goshangayaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangayaymushĂ«|gokishangayaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangayaymuro|shangayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangayaynkmuro|goshangayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangayaymuro|gokishangayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
